heading: Effect on other law and agreements
label: 2009 Effect on other law and agreements
text: Except as provided in subsections (a), (b), and (c) of , this chapter shall not preempt any provision of any State or local law or of any negotiated collective bargaining agreement that prohibits lie detector tests or is more restrictive with respect to lie detector tests than any provision of this chapter.section 2006 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 6 months after , except that rules and regulations shall be issued not later than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .June 27, 1988June 27, 1988section 11 of Pub. L. 100–347section 2001 of this title
